source_method: Surface cutting / dredging of bogs (negligible in India; mainly Nilgiris/Kashmir)
driver_extraction: shallow, hand/excavator cutting; very high in-situ moisture.
driver_processing: extensive sun/air drying — drying is the swing cost.
driver_logistics: very low energy density => uneconomic to transport far.
driver_structural: marginal fuel, mostly horticultural use.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: shallow, hand/excavator cutting; very high in-situ moisture. PROCESSING: extensive sun/air drying — drying is the swing cost. ENERGY/REAGENTS: minimal mechanisation. LOGISTICS: very low energy density => uneconomic to transport far. FISCAL/ESG: wetland/peatland protection, high carbon-release sensitivity. STRUCTURAL: marginal fuel, mostly horticultural use.

driver_extraction: very high overburden:lignite ratio; soft, water-bearing strata needing heavy dewatering; large continuous-excavation systems.
driver_processing: high moisture & low GCV => mine-mouth power siting rather than transport.
driver_energy_reagents: electricity for dewatering pumps & conveyors; diesel for fleet.
driver_logistics: short-haul conveyor to adjacent power plant.
driver_fiscal_esg: very large surface footprint, rehabilitation & land/R&R (India).
driver_structural: integration with captive power station dictates economics.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: very high overburden:lignite ratio; soft, water-bearing strata needing heavy dewatering; large continuous-excavation systems. PROCESSING: high moisture & low GCV => mine-mouth power siting rather than transport. ENERGY/REAGENTS: electricity for dewatering pumps & conveyors; diesel for fleet. LOGISTICS: short-haul conveyor to adjacent power plant. FISCAL/ESG: very large surface footprint, rehabilitation & land/R&R (India). STRUCTURAL: integration with captive power station dictates economics.

source_method: Open-pit / strip (e.g. US PRB analogue; some Indian basins)
driver_extraction: strip ratio & overburden blastability; seam thickness/continuity.
driver_processing: moderate moisture; limited washing.
driver_logistics: rail haul cost can exceed mine-gate price.
driver_structural: low sulphur often a selling point; CV drives $/GJ.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: strip ratio & overburden blastability; seam thickness/continuity. PROCESSING: moderate moisture; limited washing. ENERGY/REAGENTS: diesel (haulage) + explosives dominate. LOGISTICS: rail haul cost can exceed mine-gate price. FISCAL/ESG: royalties, dust/water compliance, closure. STRUCTURAL: low sulphur often a selling point; CV drives $/GJ.

source_method: Open-pit & underground (bulk of Indian Coal India output)
meaningful_metric: $/GJ; India GCV bands G1-G17 set notified price
driver_extraction: strip ratio (open-pit) or seam depth & support (underground); dilution & seam continuity.
driver_processing: washing/beneficiation yield to hit ash spec (Indian coal is high-ash).
driver_logistics: rail to pithead-distant plants; evacuation bottlenecks.
driver_fiscal_esg: royalty + GST compensation cess + DMF/NMET levies; land acquisition & R&R.
driver_structural: GCV band sets notified price; e-auction premium; mega-mine scale lowers unit cost.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: strip ratio (open-pit) or seam depth & support (underground); dilution & seam continuity. PROCESSING: washing/beneficiation yield to hit ash spec (Indian coal is high-ash). ENERGY/REAGENTS: diesel, electricity, explosives; wash-plant power. LOGISTICS: rail to pithead-distant plants; evacuation bottlenecks. FISCAL/ESG: royalty + GST compensation cess + DMF/NMET levies; land acquisition & R&R. STRUCTURAL: GCV band sets notified price; e-auction premium; mega-mine scale lowers unit cost.

source_method: Underground longwall or open-pit (scarce in India; largely imported)
meaningful_metric: $/t by quality tier (premium hard coking > PCI > SSCC)
driver_extraction: seam depth, methane gas (drainage), geotechnical/outburst risk; underground ventilation & support; longwall move frequency.
driver_processing: washability & low yield after washing; quality spec (CSR/CSN, ash, S, volatile matter) is decisive.
driver_logistics: to coke ovens/steel plants; port for imports.
driver_structural: India imports most coking coal => price exposed to seaborne premium.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: seam depth, methane gas (drainage), geotechnical/outburst risk; underground ventilation & support; longwall move frequency. PROCESSING: washability & low yield after washing; quality spec (CSR/CSN, ash, S, volatile matter) is decisive. ENERGY/REAGENTS: high — wash plant, ventilation, support. LOGISTICS: to coke ovens/steel plants; port for imports. FISCAL/ESG: royalty, safety regulation (gassy mines), closure. STRUCTURAL: India imports most coking coal => price exposed to seaborne premium.

source_method: Underground / deep open-pit (negligible in India; some imports)
driver_extraction: deep, often steep/folded seams => low productivity; high development cost.
driver_processing: sizing/screening for lump premium; low volatiles.
driver_structural: small, premium market (sinter, water filtration, specialty metallurgy).
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: deep, often steep/folded seams => low productivity; high development cost. PROCESSING: sizing/screening for lump premium; low volatiles. ENERGY/REAGENTS: underground power & support intensive. LOGISTICS: specialised metallurgical/heating markets. FISCAL/ESG: deep-mine safety; closure. STRUCTURAL: small, premium market (sinter, water filtration, specialty metallurgy).

cost_basis: Per tonne ore milled / per tonne Cu
cost_text: Ore: ~$8-20/t open-pit, $30-60/t underground. Metal: C1 ~$2.00-2.75/lb (~$4,400-6,000/t Cu)
meaningful_metric: C1 / AISC per lb Cu (AISC ~$1,400-3,000/t net of credits)
driver_extraction: ore grade (%Cu) is dominant; strip ratio; depth/UG transition; ore hardness (Bond Wi).
driver_processing: comminution (crush+grind = bulk of mill opex); recovery & mineralogy (sulphide flotation vs oxide SX-EW leach).
driver_energy_reagents: power (grinding) 25-40% of opex; reagents (collectors, lime, frother), acid for oxide.
driver_structural: by-product credits (Au, Ag, Mo) can halve net cost; grade decline raises tonnes/unit metal.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: ore grade (%Cu) is dominant; strip ratio; depth/UG transition; ore hardness (Bond Wi). PROCESSING: comminution (crush+grind = bulk of mill opex); recovery & mineralogy (sulphide flotation vs oxide SX-EW leach). ENERGY/REAGENTS: power (grinding) 25-40% of opex; reagents (collectors, lime, frother), acid for oxide. LOGISTICS: concentrate freight + smelter TC/RC. FISCAL/ESG: tailings dam safety, water/desalination, royalties. STRUCTURAL: by-product credits (Au, Ag, Mo) can halve net cost; grade decline raises tonnes/unit metal.

source_method: Bauxite open-pit -> Bayer alumina refining -> Hall-Heroult smelting
cost_text: Bauxite ~$15-35/t; alumina ~$250-400/t; primary Al cash cost ~$1,800-2,400/t
meaningful_metric: $/t Al; electricity is the master driver
driver_extraction: bauxite overburden ratio, Al2O3 grade, reactive silica, moisture.
driver_processing: Bayer (caustic soda, energy for digestion) then smelting.
driver_energy_reagents: SMELTING ELECTRICITY is ~30-40% of metal cost — power contract/grid carbon is decisive; caustic soda, carbon anodes, alumina feed.
driver_fiscal_esg: red-mud (bauxite residue) disposal, PFC/CO2 emissions, carbon price.
driver_structural: captive vs grid power separates low-cost from high-cost smelters.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: bauxite overburden ratio, Al2O3 grade, reactive silica, moisture. PROCESSING: Bayer (caustic soda, energy for digestion) then smelting. ENERGY/REAGENTS: SMELTING ELECTRICITY is ~30-40% of metal cost — power contract/grid carbon is decisive; caustic soda, carbon anodes, alumina feed. LOGISTICS: bauxite->refinery->smelter proximity; ocean freight. FISCAL/ESG: red-mud (bauxite residue) disposal, PFC/CO2 emissions, carbon price. STRUCTURAL: captive vs grid power separates low-cost from high-cost smelters.

cost_basis: Per tonne ore milled / per tonne Pb
cost_text: Ore: ~$30-60/t. Metal: C1 frequently NEGATIVE after credits
meaningful_metric: C1 per lb Pb (silver credits often dominate)
driver_extraction: grade (%Pb), depth, ground support & backfill.
driver_processing: differential flotation (Pb/Zn separation) complexity; concentrate grade.
driver_energy_reagents: ventilation, pumping at depth; flotation reagents.
driver_logistics: concentrate to smelter; TC/RC & penalty elements.
driver_structural: SILVER by-product credit often makes lead C1 negative; smelter payability terms key.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: grade (%Pb), depth, ground support & backfill. PROCESSING: differential flotation (Pb/Zn separation) complexity; concentrate grade. ENERGY/REAGENTS: ventilation, pumping at depth; flotation reagents. LOGISTICS: concentrate to smelter; TC/RC & penalty elements. FISCAL/ESG: lead toxicity controls, tailings. STRUCTURAL: SILVER by-product credit often makes lead C1 negative; smelter payability terms key.

cost_basis: Per tonne ore milled / per tonne Zn
cost_text: Ore: ~$30-60/t. Metal: C1 ~$0.80-1.20/lb net of credits
driver_extraction: grade (%Zn), depth, development & paste backfill.
driver_processing: flotation to concentrate; recovery.
driver_energy_reagents: deep-mine ventilation/pumping; smelting electrolysis is power-intensive.
driver_structural: silver/lead by-product credits; smelter payability & sulphuric-acid by-product economics.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: grade (%Zn), depth, development & paste backfill. PROCESSING: flotation to concentrate; recovery. ENERGY/REAGENTS: deep-mine ventilation/pumping; smelting electrolysis is power-intensive. LOGISTICS: concentrate to smelter; TC/RC. FISCAL/ESG: tailings, water, royalties. STRUCTURAL: silver/lead by-product credits; smelter payability & sulphuric-acid by-product economics.

cost_basis: Per tonne ore mined / per tonne Ni
cost_text: Ore mining ~$10-30/t; total-to-metal set by processing route
meaningful_metric: $/t Ni; route (HPAL vs RKEF vs sulphide) is the swing
driver_extraction: grade & deposit type (limonite vs saprolite laterite; sulphide).
driver_processing: ROUTE DOMINATES — HPAL (sulphuric-acid intensive) vs RKEF (energy intensive) vs sulphide flotation+smelting.
driver_fiscal_esg: acid-tailings neutralisation, deep-sea tailings controversy, Indonesia export policy.
driver_structural: COBALT by-product credit; Indonesian RKEF flood has reset the cost curve.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: grade & deposit type (limonite vs saprolite laterite; sulphide). PROCESSING: ROUTE DOMINATES — HPAL (sulphuric-acid intensive) vs RKEF (energy intensive) vs sulphide flotation+smelting. ENERGY/REAGENTS: acid (HPAL) or coal/electricity (RKEF) huge. LOGISTICS: ore moisture, concentrate/MHP shipping. FISCAL/ESG: acid-tailings neutralisation, deep-sea tailings controversy, Indonesia export policy. STRUCTURAL: COBALT by-product credit; Indonesian RKEF flood has reset the cost curve.

cost_basis: Per tonne ore / per tonne Sn
cost_text: Alluvial low; hard-rock higher. Metal price ~$25,000-35,000/t Sn
driver_extraction: cassiterite grade; alluvial (cheap gravity) vs hard-rock (drill-blast-mill).
driver_processing: gravity concentration; some flotation; smelting/fuming.
driver_energy_reagents: modest for alluvial; higher for hard-rock milling.
driver_fiscal_esg: artisanal/illegal mining & conflict-mineral due diligence; dredging & river-sediment impacts.
driver_structural: heavy artisanal supply (Myanmar, DRC, Indonesia) sets marginal cost; tantalum often co-recovered.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: cassiterite grade; alluvial (cheap gravity) vs hard-rock (drill-blast-mill). PROCESSING: gravity concentration; some flotation; smelting/fuming. ENERGY/REAGENTS: modest for alluvial; higher for hard-rock milling. LOGISTICS: concentrate to smelter. FISCAL/ESG: artisanal/illegal mining & conflict-mineral due diligence; dredging & river-sediment impacts. STRUCTURAL: heavy artisanal supply (Myanmar, DRC, Indonesia) sets marginal cost; tantalum often co-recovered.

source_method: Open-pit mill, heap leach, or underground (also by-product of Cu)
cost_basis: Per tonne ore milled / per ounce Au
driver_extraction: head grade (g/t) dominant; strip ratio; depth (UG cost).
driver_processing: metallurgy — free-milling vs REFRACTORY (needs roasting/pressure-ox/BIOX, big cost step); recovery.
driver_energy_reagents: milling energy, cyanide, lime, activated carbon.
driver_fiscal_esg: cyanide & tailings management, jurisdiction/security risk, govt take.
driver_structural: oxide heap-leach (cheap) vs sulphide CIL/CIP; Ag/Cu by-product credits.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: head grade (g/t) dominant; strip ratio; depth (UG cost). PROCESSING: metallurgy — free-milling vs REFRACTORY (needs roasting/pressure-ox/BIOX, big cost step); recovery. ENERGY/REAGENTS: milling energy, cyanide, lime, activated carbon. LOGISTICS: doré is high-value/low-volume => transport trivial. FISCAL/ESG: cyanide & tailings management, jurisdiction/security risk, govt take. STRUCTURAL: oxide heap-leach (cheap) vs sulphide CIL/CIP; Ag/Cu by-product credits.

source_method: By-product of Pb/Zn/Cu (~70%) or primary Ag mines (~30%)
driver_extraction: at primary mines, grade & depth; at polymetallic mines, silver rides on the host.
driver_processing: flotation/leach recovery; refining of dore/anode slimes.
driver_energy_reagents: shared with host metal at by-product operations.
driver_structural: ~2/3 of supply is a BY-PRODUCT => primary-mine AISC overstates true marginal cost; cost allocation method (by-product vs co-product) changes the headline number materially.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: at primary mines, grade & depth; at polymetallic mines, silver rides on the host. PROCESSING: flotation/leach recovery; refining of dore/anode slimes. ENERGY/REAGENTS: shared with host metal at by-product operations. LOGISTICS: minimal (high value density). FISCAL/ESG: same as host base-metal mine. STRUCTURAL: ~2/3 of supply is a BY-PRODUCT => primary-mine AISC overstates true marginal cost; cost allocation method (by-product vs co-product) changes the headline number materially.

source_method: Reef/UG (Bushveld) or by-product of Ni/Cu sulphide
meaningful_metric: AISC per oz; '4E'/'6E' PGE basket price
driver_extraction: deep, narrow tabular reefs => labour-intensive, low productivity, deepening & lower grade.
driver_processing: complex smelting + base-metal refinery + precious-metal refinery; long pipeline lock-up.
driver_energy_reagents: smelting power, reagents; South African grid risk.
driver_fiscal_esg: deep-mine safety, water, community, Eskom power reliability, FX (ZAR).
driver_structural: priced as a BASKET (Pt, Pd, Rh, Ru, Ir + Au/Ni/Cu credits) — one element's price props the whole mine; auto-catalyst demand vs EV substitution.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: deep, narrow tabular reefs => labour-intensive, low productivity, deepening & lower grade. PROCESSING: complex smelting + base-metal refinery + precious-metal refinery; long pipeline lock-up. ENERGY/REAGENTS: smelting power, reagents; South African grid risk. LOGISTICS: concentrate within integrated complex. FISCAL/ESG: deep-mine safety, water, community, Eskom power reliability, FX (ZAR). STRUCTURAL: priced as a BASKET (Pt, Pd, Rh, Ru, Ir + Au/Ni/Cu credits) — one element's price props the whole mine; auto-catalyst demand vs EV substitution.

source_method: ISR (in-situ recovery), open-pit, or underground (India: deep hard-rock UG, UCIL Jaduguda)
driver_extraction: METHOD is decisive — ISR (cheapest, >70% of world supply) vs open-pit vs deep UG (India's mode = high-cost, low-grade ~0.05% U).
driver_processing: leaching (acid/alkaline), milling, yellowcake precipitation; grade sets tonnes per lb.
driver_fiscal_esg: radiation safety, tailings (radon, long-lived), permitting & public acceptance — major cost & timeline driver.
driver_structural: India's deposits are low-grade => intrinsically high-cost; sometimes a by-product (Olympic Dam ~$45-50/lb).
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: METHOD is decisive — ISR (cheapest, >70% of world supply) vs open-pit vs deep UG (India's mode = high-cost, low-grade ~0.05% U). PROCESSING: leaching (acid/alkaline), milling, yellowcake precipitation; grade sets tonnes per lb. ENERGY/REAGENTS: acid/lixiviant, power; UG ventilation. LOGISTICS: low volume, secure transport. FISCAL/ESG: radiation safety, tailings (radon, long-lived), permitting & public acceptance — major cost & timeline driver. STRUCTURAL: India's deposits are low-grade => intrinsically high-cost; sometimes a by-product (Olympic Dam ~$45-50/lb).

source_method: By-product of beach-sand monazite mining (India: Kerala, TN, Odisha coast; IREL)
cost_basis: Per tonne monazite / per kg Th
cost_text: No standalone Th mine — recovered from monazite (~8-10% ThO2)
meaningful_metric: Cost embedded in mineral-sands & REE processing
driver_extraction: NOT mined for thorium — recovered from heavy-mineral beach sands dredged primarily for ilmenite/rutile/zircon/garnet.
driver_processing: monazite cracking (acid/alkali) to separate Th, U and rare earths — chemically complex & regulated.
driver_fiscal_esg: monazite is radioactive (Th+U) => strict Atomic Energy regulation, secure storage of Th residues; coastal/CRZ environmental limits.
driver_structural: economics ride on the ilmenite/zircon/REE basket; Th itself has no current fuel-cycle market => stockpiled, not sold.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: NOT mined for thorium — recovered from heavy-mineral beach sands dredged primarily for ilmenite/rutile/zircon/garnet. PROCESSING: monazite cracking (acid/alkali) to separate Th, U and rare earths — chemically complex & regulated. ENERGY/REAGENTS: caustic/acid digestion, energy. LOGISTICS: minor volume. FISCAL/ESG: monazite is radioactive (Th+U) => strict Atomic Energy regulation, secure storage of Th residues; coastal/CRZ environmental limits. STRUCTURAL: economics ride on the ilmenite/zircon/REE basket; Th itself has no current fuel-cycle market => stockpiled, not sold.

source_method: Stibnite ore mining; also by-product of Au/Pb
driver_extraction: stibnite grade; small, often artisanal/underground deposits.
driver_processing: gravity + flotation; pyrometallurgical/hydromet to metal or trioxide.
driver_fiscal_esg: arsenic association & toxicity controls; China export curbs.
driver_structural: supply highly concentrated (China, Tajikistan, Russia) => geopolitical price spikes; flame-retardant & defence demand.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: stibnite grade; small, often artisanal/underground deposits. PROCESSING: gravity + flotation; pyrometallurgical/hydromet to metal or trioxide. ENERGY/REAGENTS: smelting energy; modest. LOGISTICS: concentrate to limited smelters. FISCAL/ESG: arsenic association & toxicity controls; China export curbs. STRUCTURAL: supply highly concentrated (China, Tajikistan, Russia) => geopolitical price spikes; flame-retardant & defence demand.

source_method: Bertrandite open-pit / beryl by-product of pegmatite mining
cost_text: Very high, niche; cost dominated by processing
driver_extraction: low-grade bertrandite or hand-cobbed beryl from pegmatites.
driver_processing: complex hydrometallurgy to beryllium hydroxide/oxide/metal — dominant cost.
driver_fiscal_esg: SEVERE — berylliosis (chronic lung disease) => stringent dust/worker controls drive cost.
driver_structural: near-monopoly supply (US Spor Mountain); defence/aerospace/electronics demand.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: low-grade bertrandite or hand-cobbed beryl from pegmatites. PROCESSING: complex hydrometallurgy to beryllium hydroxide/oxide/metal — dominant cost. ENERGY/REAGENTS: specialised chemical processing. LOGISTICS: tiny volumes. FISCAL/ESG: SEVERE — berylliosis (chronic lung disease) => stringent dust/worker controls drive cost. STRUCTURAL: near-monopoly supply (US Spor Mountain); defence/aerospace/electronics demand.

cost_text: Recovered as by-product; metal price volatile (~$8,000-40,000/t historically)
driver_extraction: essentially none standalone — collected in lead/W/Cu circuits.
driver_processing: separation from refinery slimes/residues; refining to metal.
driver_structural: BY-PRODUCT — cost = incremental recovery vs disposal; China dominant; pharma/low-melt-alloy/lead-substitute demand.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: essentially none standalone — collected in lead/W/Cu circuits. PROCESSING: separation from refinery slimes/residues; refining to metal. ENERGY/REAGENTS: incremental refining only. LOGISTICS: minor. FISCAL/ESG: shares host-metal footprint. STRUCTURAL: BY-PRODUCT — cost = incremental recovery vs disposal; China dominant; pharma/low-melt-alloy/lead-substitute demand.

source_method: By-product of copper (DRC) & nickel; minor primary
cost_text: Metal ~$33,000-56,000/t (2025-26); largely a credit to Cu/Ni
driver_extraction: ~>70% is a by-product of DRC copper; rest from nickel laterite/sulphide.
driver_processing: hydromet (SX, MHP, sulphate) for battery grade.
driver_fiscal_esg: DRC artisanal mining, child-labour due diligence, export bans/quotas.
driver_structural: by-product => supply driven by copper economics, not cobalt price; China dominates refining.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: ~>70% is a by-product of DRC copper; rest from nickel laterite/sulphide. PROCESSING: hydromet (SX, MHP, sulphate) for battery grade. ENERGY/REAGENTS: acid/reagents in refining. LOGISTICS: DRC->landlocked->port; concentrate/hydroxide shipping. FISCAL/ESG: DRC artisanal mining, child-labour due diligence, export bans/quotas. STRUCTURAL: by-product => supply driven by copper economics, not cobalt price; China dominates refining.

cost_basis: Per t ore / per t Cu
driver_extraction: ore grade (%Cu) is dominant; strip ratio; depth & open-pit-to-underground transition; ore hardness (Bond Wi).
driver_processing: comminution (crush+grind) is the bulk of mill opex; recovery & mineralogy (sulphide flotation vs oxide SX-EW leach).
driver_energy_reagents: grinding power ~25-40% of opex; collectors, lime, frother; acid for oxide leach.
driver_structural: by-product credits (Au, Ag, Mo) can halve net cost; grade decline; India is a large refined-copper importer with limited domestic ore. (Fuller treatment in the Base Metals entry.)
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: ore grade (%Cu) is dominant; strip ratio; depth & open-pit-to-underground transition; ore hardness (Bond Wi).; PROCESSING: comminution (crush+grind) is the bulk of mill opex; recovery & mineralogy (sulphide flotation vs oxide SX-EW leach).; ENERGY/REAGENTS: grinding power ~25-40% of opex; collectors, lime, frother; acid for oxide leach.; LOGISTICS: concentrate freight + smelter TC/RC charges.; FISCAL/ESG: tailings dam safety, water/desalination, royalties.; STRUCTURAL: by-product credits (Au, Ag, Mo) can halve net cost; grade decline; India is a large refined-copper importer with limited domestic ore. (Fuller treatment in the Base Metals entry.)

source_method: By-product of Bayer alumina (bauxite) & zinc processing
cost_text: Recovered from process liquor; price spiked after China export curbs
driver_extraction: none standalone — extracted from Bayer-process caustic liquor (alumina) or zinc residues.
driver_processing: solvent extraction/electrolysis to high-purity gallium.
driver_structural: BY-PRODUCT — China ~90%+; 2023-24 export controls caused price/availability shock; semiconductors/LEDs demand.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: none standalone — extracted from Bayer-process caustic liquor (alumina) or zinc residues. PROCESSING: solvent extraction/electrolysis to high-purity gallium. ENERGY/REAGENTS: incremental chemical recovery. LOGISTICS: tiny volume. FISCAL/ESG: shares alumina footprint. STRUCTURAL: BY-PRODUCT — China ~90%+; 2023-24 export controls caused price/availability shock; semiconductors/LEDs demand.

source_method: By-product of zinc refining & coal fly ash
cost_text: Recovered from zinc streams; high value, China export-controlled
driver_extraction: none standalone — concentrated in zinc concentrates/residues & some lignite ash (cf. Titan Mining recovering Ge from zinc streams).
driver_processing: chlorination, hydrolysis, zone refining to optical/semiconductor grade.
driver_structural: BY-PRODUCT — China-dominated, export-controlled; fibre-optics, IR optics, semiconductors.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: none standalone — concentrated in zinc concentrates/residues & some lignite ash (cf. Titan Mining recovering Ge from zinc streams). PROCESSING: chlorination, hydrolysis, zone refining to optical/semiconductor grade. ENERGY/REAGENTS: specialised purification. LOGISTICS: minute volume. FISCAL/ESG: host-metal footprint. STRUCTURAL: BY-PRODUCT — China-dominated, export-controlled; fibre-optics, IR optics, semiconductors.

meaningful_metric: $/t by flake size & purity; battery (CSPG) premium
driver_extraction: flake size distribution & carbon grade in ore; open-pit.
driver_processing: flotation; for battery anode => micronising, SPHERONISATION & purification (>99.95%) — these downstream steps dominate cost.
driver_structural: China dominates flake + spherical; synthetic graphite (from petroleum needle coke, energy-intensive) is the substitute.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: flake size distribution & carbon grade in ore; open-pit. PROCESSING: flotation; for battery anode => micronising, SPHERONISATION & purification (>99.95%) — these downstream steps dominate cost. ENERGY/REAGENTS: flotation reagents; purification (thermal/HF or caustic). LOGISTICS: concentrate shipping. FISCAL/ESG: HF-purification effluent controls. STRUCTURAL: China dominates flake + spherical; synthetic graphite (from petroleum needle coke, energy-intensive) is the substitute.

source_method: By-product of zirconium refining (nuclear-grade Zr separation)
driver_extraction: none — always with zircon/zirconium.
driver_processing: the COST IS THE SEPARATION of chemically near-identical Hf from Zr (solvent extraction) needed because nuclear Zr must be Hf-free.
driver_structural: BY-PRODUCT of nuclear-grade zirconium demand; superalloys & semiconductors.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: none — always with zircon/zirconium. PROCESSING: the COST IS THE SEPARATION of chemically near-identical Hf from Zr (solvent extraction) needed because nuclear Zr must be Hf-free. ENERGY/REAGENTS: solvent-extraction chemicals, energy. LOGISTICS: tiny. FISCAL/ESG: nuclear-supply-chain controls. STRUCTURAL: BY-PRODUCT of nuclear-grade zirconium demand; superalloys & semiconductors.

driver_extraction: none standalone — in zinc (sphalerite) concentrates/residues.
driver_processing: leaching from residues, solvent extraction, electrorefining.
driver_structural: BY-PRODUCT — supply tied to zinc output; ITO (indium-tin-oxide) for flat-panel/touchscreens, thin-film solar.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: none standalone — in zinc (sphalerite) concentrates/residues. PROCESSING: leaching from residues, solvent extraction, electrorefining. ENERGY/REAGENTS: incremental hydromet. LOGISTICS: minor. FISCAL/ESG: host-metal footprint. STRUCTURAL: BY-PRODUCT — supply tied to zinc output; ITO (indium-tin-oxide) for flat-panel/touchscreens, thin-film solar.

source_method: See Critical/Base context; spodumene open-pit or brine evaporation
driver_extraction: hard-rock Li2O grade & hardness vs brine concentration & Mg:Li ratio.
driver_processing: spodumene roast-leach to carbonate/hydroxide (major cost) vs brine solar evaporation (climate-dependent) or Direct Lithium Extraction (DLE).
driver_logistics: spodumene concentrate freight to converters (mostly China).
driver_structural: India's J&K Reasi find is early-stage; chemical-grade conversion is where value/cost concentrates.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: hard-rock Li2O grade & hardness vs brine concentration & Mg:Li ratio. PROCESSING: spodumene roast-leach to carbonate/hydroxide (major cost) vs brine solar evaporation (climate-dependent) or Direct Lithium Extraction (DLE). ENERGY/REAGENTS: acid/soda ash, energy for conversion. LOGISTICS: spodumene concentrate freight to converters (mostly China). FISCAL/ESG: water use (brine), tailings. STRUCTURAL: India's J&K Reasi find is early-stage; chemical-grade conversion is where value/cost concentrates.

source_method: By-product of porphyry copper; some primary Mo mines
driver_extraction: mostly a by-product of copper porphyries (grade rides on Cu ore); primary Climax-type mines exist.
driver_processing: separate moly flotation circuit; roasting MoS2 to oxide (also yields rhenium).
driver_structural: by-product credit lowers copper C1; steel-alloy demand cyclical.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: mostly a by-product of copper porphyries (grade rides on Cu ore); primary Climax-type mines exist. PROCESSING: separate moly flotation circuit; roasting MoS2 to oxide (also yields rhenium). ENERGY/REAGENTS: roasting energy, reagents. LOGISTICS: concentrate to roasters. FISCAL/ESG: SO2 capture in roasting. STRUCTURAL: by-product credit lowers copper C1; steel-alloy demand cyclical.

cost_text: Low at Brazilian scale; project-specific elsewhere
driver_extraction: pyrochlore grade in weathered carbonatite; open-pit.
driver_processing: flotation/magnetic concentration; aluminothermic reduction to ferroniobium.
driver_structural: ~90% from one Brazilian producer (CBMM) => scale-driven low cost; HSLA steel & superalloy demand.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: pyrochlore grade in weathered carbonatite; open-pit. PROCESSING: flotation/magnetic concentration; aluminothermic reduction to ferroniobium. ENERGY/REAGENTS: reduction energy. LOGISTICS: FeNb to steelmakers. FISCAL/ESG: tailings, radioactivity (U/Th in pyrochlore). STRUCTURAL: ~90% from one Brazilian producer (CBMM) => scale-driven low cost; HSLA steel & superalloy demand.

cost_basis: Per t ore / per t Ni
driver_extraction: grade & deposit type (limonite vs saprolite laterite; sulphide).
driver_processing: route dominates - HPAL (acid-intensive) vs RKEF (energy-intensive) vs sulphide flotation+smelting.
driver_fiscal_esg: acid-tailings neutralisation; deep-sea tailings controversy; Indonesia export policy.
driver_structural: cobalt by-product credit; Indonesian RKEF expansion has reset the cost curve; India is import-dependent. (Fuller treatment in the Base Metals entry.)
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: grade & deposit type (limonite vs saprolite laterite; sulphide).; PROCESSING: route dominates - HPAL (acid-intensive) vs RKEF (energy-intensive) vs sulphide flotation+smelting.; ENERGY/REAGENTS: sulphuric acid (HPAL) or coal/electricity (RKEF); reagents.; LOGISTICS: ore moisture; MHP/concentrate shipping.; FISCAL/ESG: acid-tailings neutralisation; deep-sea tailings controversy; Indonesia export policy.; STRUCTURAL: cobalt by-product credit; Indonesian RKEF expansion has reset the cost curve; India is import-dependent. (Fuller treatment in the Base Metals entry.)

driver_extraction: deep, narrow tabular reefs => labour-intensive, low productivity, deepening & falling grade.
driver_processing: complex smelting + base-metal refinery + precious-metal refinery; long pipeline lock-up.
driver_energy_reagents: smelting power, reagents; South African grid risk.
driver_fiscal_esg: deep-mine safety, water, community, power reliability, FX (ZAR).
driver_structural: priced as a basket (Pt, Pd, Rh, Ru, Ir + Au/Ni/Cu credits); auto-catalyst demand vs EV substitution. (Fuller treatment in the Precious Metals entry.)
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: deep, narrow tabular reefs => labour-intensive, low productivity, deepening & falling grade.; PROCESSING: complex smelting + base-metal refinery + precious-metal refinery; long pipeline lock-up.; ENERGY/REAGENTS: smelting power, reagents; South African grid risk.; LOGISTICS: handled within the integrated complex.; FISCAL/ESG: deep-mine safety, water, community, power reliability, FX (ZAR).; STRUCTURAL: priced as a basket (Pt, Pd, Rh, Ru, Ir + Au/Ni/Cu credits); auto-catalyst demand vs EV substitution. (Fuller treatment in the Precious Metals entry.)

driver_extraction: P2O5 grade & gangue; overburden ratio.
driver_processing: beneficiation (flotation/washing) for low grade; cadmium/uranium penalties.
driver_structural: India imports most rock/DAP => food-security 'fertilizer mineral'; price tied to global P market.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: P2O5 grade & gangue; overburden ratio. PROCESSING: beneficiation (flotation/washing) for low grade; cadmium/uranium penalties. ENERGY/REAGENTS: beneficiation power/water; downstream acidulation. LOGISTICS: bulk shipping. FISCAL/ESG: cadmium limits, gypsum (phosphogypsum) waste. STRUCTURAL: India imports most rock/DAP => food-security 'fertilizer mineral'; price tied to global P market.

source_method: Underground conventional or solution mining; brine evaporation
driver_extraction: depth & seam thickness; conventional UG vs SOLUTION mining vs brine ponds.
driver_processing: flotation/crystallisation; compaction.
driver_logistics: bulk rail/port — logistics is a large share.
driver_structural: India imports ~100% => 'fertilizer mineral' for food security; oligopolistic global supply (Canada, Russia, Belarus).
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: depth & seam thickness; conventional UG vs SOLUTION mining vs brine ponds. PROCESSING: flotation/crystallisation; compaction. ENERGY/REAGENTS: solution-mining energy; evaporation. LOGISTICS: bulk rail/port — logistics is a large share. FISCAL/ESG: brine/tailings salt management, subsidence. STRUCTURAL: India imports ~100% => 'fertilizer mineral' for food security; oligopolistic global supply (Canada, Russia, Belarus).

source_method: Bastnaesite/monazite (open-pit) or ionic-clay; India: beach-sand monazite
cost_text: Blended ~US$70/kg needed for viable IRR; heavy REE far costlier
meaningful_metric: $/kg by individual oxide (NdPr, Dy, Tb premium)
driver_extraction: total REO grade & the mix (magnet/heavy REE value vs cheap La/Ce).
driver_processing: SEPARATION is the cost — cracking + dozens of solvent-extraction stages to split chemically similar elements; radioactive Th/U in monazite complicates.
driver_fiscal_esg: Th/U radioactive residues (Atomic Energy rules in India), effluent.
driver_structural: China ~60% mining, ~90% separation => the bottleneck & price-setter; mining is easy, SEPARATION is the moat.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: total REO grade & the mix (magnet/heavy REE value vs cheap La/Ce). PROCESSING: SEPARATION is the cost — cracking + dozens of solvent-extraction stages to split chemically similar elements; radioactive Th/U in monazite complicates. ENERGY/REAGENTS: huge acid/solvent consumption; effluent. LOGISTICS: concentrate to separation plants. FISCAL/ESG: Th/U radioactive residues (Atomic Energy rules in India), effluent. STRUCTURAL: China ~60% mining, ~90% separation => the bottleneck & price-setter; mining is easy, SEPARATION is the moat.

source_method: By-product of molybdenum roasting (from Cu-Mo porphyries)
driver_extraction: none — captured from MoS2 roaster flue gases.
driver_processing: scrubbing flue dust, precipitation to ammonium perrhenate.
driver_structural: BY-PRODUCT of a by-product (Re<-Mo<-Cu) => supply very inelastic; superalloy turbine blades & Pt-Re reforming catalysts.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: none — captured from MoS2 roaster flue gases. PROCESSING: scrubbing flue dust, precipitation to ammonium perrhenate. ENERGY/REAGENTS: incremental to moly roasting. LOGISTICS: minute. FISCAL/ESG: flue-gas capture. STRUCTURAL: BY-PRODUCT of a by-product (Re<-Mo<-Cu) => supply very inelastic; superalloy turbine blades & Pt-Re reforming catalysts.

source_method: Quartz/silica + carbothermic reduction in arc furnace
driver_extraction: silica (quartz) is cheap & abundant — purity/Fe content matters.
driver_processing: submerged-arc furnace carbothermic reduction (quartz + carbon).
driver_energy_reagents: ELECTRICITY (12-13 MWh/t Si) + carbon reductants dominate — effectively an electricity-into-metal business.
driver_structural: cheap-power regions win; polysilicon (solar/semis) adds another energy-intensive refining tier.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: silica (quartz) is cheap & abundant — purity/Fe content matters. PROCESSING: submerged-arc furnace carbothermic reduction (quartz + carbon). ENERGY/REAGENTS: ELECTRICITY (12-13 MWh/t Si) + carbon reductants dominate — effectively an electricity-into-metal business. LOGISTICS: bulk. FISCAL/ESG: furnace CO2, microsilica by-product. STRUCTURAL: cheap-power regions win; polysilicon (solar/semis) adds another energy-intensive refining tier.

driver_extraction: celestine grade; simple open-pit.
driver_processing: conversion to strontium carbonate (black-ash/soda process).
driver_structural: small, concentrated supply (China, Spain, Mexico, Iran); ceramics, pyrotechnics, specialty magnets.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: celestine grade; simple open-pit. PROCESSING: conversion to strontium carbonate (black-ash/soda process). ENERGY/REAGENTS: conversion energy/reagents. LOGISTICS: bulk. FISCAL/ESG: standard quarry controls. STRUCTURAL: small, concentrated supply (China, Spain, Mexico, Iran); ceramics, pyrotechnics, specialty magnets.

driver_extraction: low-grade pegmatites; often artisanal (coltan, Central Africa) or a tin by-product.
driver_processing: gravity/magnetic concentration; solvent extraction to oxides/metal.
driver_fiscal_esg: CONFLICT-MINERAL (3TG) due diligence is a major cost/compliance driver.
driver_structural: capacitor (electronics) demand; supply partly artisanal & geopolitically sensitive.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: low-grade pegmatites; often artisanal (coltan, Central Africa) or a tin by-product. PROCESSING: gravity/magnetic concentration; solvent extraction to oxides/metal. ENERGY/REAGENTS: hydromet refining. LOGISTICS: concentrate to processors. FISCAL/ESG: CONFLICT-MINERAL (3TG) due diligence is a major cost/compliance driver. STRUCTURAL: capacitor (electronics) demand; supply partly artisanal & geopolitically sensitive.

cost_text: Recovered from anode slimes; small market
driver_extraction: none — concentrated in copper-refinery anode slimes (alongside Se, Au, Ag).
driver_processing: leaching/precipitation from slimes; refining.
driver_structural: BY-PRODUCT — supply tied to copper refining volumes; CdTe thin-film solar & thermoelectrics.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: none — concentrated in copper-refinery anode slimes (alongside Se, Au, Ag). PROCESSING: leaching/precipitation from slimes; refining. ENERGY/REAGENTS: incremental. LOGISTICS: minute. FISCAL/ESG: host-refinery footprint. STRUCTURAL: BY-PRODUCT — supply tied to copper refining volumes; CdTe thin-film solar & thermoelectrics.

driver_extraction: cassiterite grade; alluvial (cheap gravity) vs hard-rock (drill-blast-mill).
driver_processing: gravity concentration, some flotation; smelting/fuming.
driver_energy_reagents: modest for alluvial; higher for hard-rock milling.
driver_fiscal_esg: artisanal/illegal mining & 3TG conflict-mineral due diligence; dredging/river-sediment impacts.
driver_structural: heavy artisanal supply (Myanmar, DRC, Indonesia) sets marginal cost; tantalum often co-recovered; solder/electronics demand. (Fuller treatment in the Base Metals entry.)
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: cassiterite grade; alluvial (cheap gravity) vs hard-rock (drill-blast-mill).; PROCESSING: gravity concentration, some flotation; smelting/fuming.; ENERGY/REAGENTS: modest for alluvial; higher for hard-rock milling.; LOGISTICS: concentrate to smelters.; FISCAL/ESG: artisanal/illegal mining & 3TG conflict-mineral due diligence; dredging/river-sediment impacts.; STRUCTURAL: heavy artisanal supply (Myanmar, DRC, Indonesia) sets marginal cost; tantalum often co-recovered; solder/electronics demand. (Fuller treatment in the Base Metals entry.)

source_method: Ilmenite/rutile beach-sand dredging & dry mining (India: coastal sands)
meaningful_metric: $/t feedstock; TiO2 pigment vs sponge metal
driver_extraction: heavy-mineral % in sand; dredge/spiral concentration (low energy).
driver_processing: gravity + magnetic + electrostatic separation; upgrading to slag/synthetic rutile; then chloride/sulphate pigment or Kroll sponge (energy-intensive).
driver_energy_reagents: Kroll process (Mg reduction) is very energy- & chlorine-intensive for metal.
driver_fiscal_esg: monazite/Th radioactivity in the same sands (Atomic Energy rules), CRZ coastal limits.
driver_structural: cheap to mine, expensive to turn into metal; co-produces zircon, REE, garnet.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: heavy-mineral % in sand; dredge/spiral concentration (low energy). PROCESSING: gravity + magnetic + electrostatic separation; upgrading to slag/synthetic rutile; then chloride/sulphate pigment or Kroll sponge (energy-intensive). ENERGY/REAGENTS: Kroll process (Mg reduction) is very energy- & chlorine-intensive for metal. LOGISTICS: bulk concentrate. FISCAL/ESG: monazite/Th radioactivity in the same sands (Atomic Energy rules), CRZ coastal limits. STRUCTURAL: cheap to mine, expensive to turn into metal; co-produces zircon, REE, garnet.

driver_extraction: scheelite/wolframite grade; hard-rock UG or open-pit.
driver_processing: gravity + flotation; conversion to ammonium paratungstate (APT) then carbide.
driver_structural: China ~80% supply & APT processing => price/availability lever; cemented-carbide & defence demand.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: scheelite/wolframite grade; hard-rock UG or open-pit. PROCESSING: gravity + flotation; conversion to ammonium paratungstate (APT) then carbide. ENERGY/REAGENTS: milling + hydromet to APT. LOGISTICS: concentrate to APT plants. FISCAL/ESG: tailings; China export policy. STRUCTURAL: China ~80% supply & APT processing => price/availability lever; cemented-carbide & defence demand.

source_method: By-product of titaniferous magnetite / steel slag; some primary
driver_extraction: mostly recovered from vanadiferous magnetite during steelmaking (slag) or from primary V deposits/stone-coal.
driver_processing: salt-roast + leach to V2O5; ferrovanadium.
driver_structural: steel-rebar demand (cyclical) + emerging vanadium-redox-flow batteries; co-product economics with steel.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: mostly recovered from vanadiferous magnetite during steelmaking (slag) or from primary V deposits/stone-coal. PROCESSING: salt-roast + leach to V2O5; ferrovanadium. ENERGY/REAGENTS: roasting energy, reagents. LOGISTICS: modest. FISCAL/ESG: roasting emissions. STRUCTURAL: steel-rebar demand (cyclical) + emerging vanadium-redox-flow batteries; co-product economics with steel.

cost_text: Zircon ~$1,500-2,500/t; nuclear-grade Zr metal far higher
driver_extraction: none standalone — co-mined with ilmenite/rutile in beach sands.
driver_processing: physical separation of zircon; for nuclear Zr, costly Hf removal (see Hafnium).
driver_fiscal_esg: low-level radioactivity (U/Th) in zircon; coastal limits.
driver_structural: ceramics/refractory demand for zircon; small high-value nuclear-grade Zr metal niche.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: none standalone — co-mined with ilmenite/rutile in beach sands. PROCESSING: physical separation of zircon; for nuclear Zr, costly Hf removal (see Hafnium). ENERGY/REAGENTS: separation; chlorination for metal. LOGISTICS: bulk concentrate. FISCAL/ESG: low-level radioactivity (U/Th) in zircon; coastal limits. STRUCTURAL: ceramics/refractory demand for zircon; small high-value nuclear-grade Zr metal niche.

driver_extraction: none — in copper-refinery anode slimes.
driver_processing: roasting/leaching of slimes, reduction to commercial selenium.
driver_structural: BY-PRODUCT — supply tied to copper electrorefining; glass, metallurgy, electronics.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: none — in copper-refinery anode slimes. PROCESSING: roasting/leaching of slimes, reduction to commercial selenium. ENERGY/REAGENTS: incremental. LOGISTICS: minor. FISCAL/ESG: host-refinery footprint. STRUCTURAL: BY-PRODUCT — supply tied to copper electrorefining; glass, metallurgy, electronics.

cost_text: Recovered from zinc; low value, often a cost to manage
driver_extraction: none — collected in zinc smelter dusts/residues.
driver_processing: distillation/electrowinning from zinc circuit.
driver_fiscal_esg: HIGH — cadmium is toxic; capture is partly driven by emission control, not revenue.
driver_structural: BY-PRODUCT — supply tied to zinc; NiCd batteries (declining), pigments; environmental restriction is the dominant 'cost driver'.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: none — collected in zinc smelter dusts/residues. PROCESSING: distillation/electrowinning from zinc circuit. ENERGY/REAGENTS: incremental. LOGISTICS: minor. FISCAL/ESG: HIGH — cadmium is toxic; capture is partly driven by emission control, not revenue. STRUCTURAL: BY-PRODUCT — supply tied to zinc; NiCd batteries (declining), pigments; environmental restriction is the dominant 'cost driver'.

meaningful_metric: C1 per tonne; adjusted to 62% Fe reference
driver_extraction: Fe grade & gangue (silica/alumina/P); hematite (direct-ship) vs magnetite (needs concentration); strip ratio; ore hardness.
driver_processing: crush-screen vs beneficiation (DR-grade vs blast-furnace); lump:fines ratio (lump premium).
driver_logistics: RAIL TO PORT + shiploading + ocean freight — huge share; product blending to spec.
driver_fiscal_esg: tailings dam safety, water, royalties; currency (AUD/BRL).
driver_structural: scale & infrastructure ownership; grade decline.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: Fe grade & gangue (silica/alumina/P); hematite (direct-ship) vs magnetite (needs concentration); strip ratio; ore hardness. PROCESSING: crush-screen vs beneficiation (DR-grade vs blast-furnace); lump:fines ratio (lump premium). ENERGY/REAGENTS: diesel haulage, crushing power. LOGISTICS: RAIL TO PORT + shiploading + ocean freight — huge share; product blending to spec. FISCAL/ESG: tailings dam safety, water, royalties; currency (AUD/BRL). STRUCTURAL: scale & infrastructure ownership; grade decline.

cost_basis: Per tonne saleable (FOB); priced per dmtu
driver_extraction: Mn grade (drives $/dmtu) & impurities (Fe/Si/P); open-cut vs UG.
driver_processing: dense-media/gravity beneficiation; lump vs fines.
driver_logistics: haul to port + ocean freight + moisture.
driver_structural: ferroalloy/steel demand; currency.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: Mn grade (drives $/dmtu) & impurities (Fe/Si/P); open-cut vs UG. PROCESSING: dense-media/gravity beneficiation; lump vs fines. ENERGY/REAGENTS: beneficiation power. LOGISTICS: haul to port + ocean freight + moisture. FISCAL/ESG: state royalties, weather/cyclone (NT), export-policy risk (Gabon). STRUCTURAL: ferroalloy/steel demand; currency.

driver_extraction: overburden ratio; CaO purity & deleterious content (MgO/silica/alkalis); blast fragmentation.
driver_processing: crushing (energy & maintenance).
driver_logistics: QUARRY-TO-PLANT HAULAGE is the swing cost.
driver_fiscal_esg: dust/blast-vibration limits, water table, royalties, reserve life vs plant.
driver_structural: captive to cement plant economics.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: overburden ratio; CaO purity & deleterious content (MgO/silica/alkalis); blast fragmentation. PROCESSING: crushing (energy & maintenance). ENERGY/REAGENTS: crusher power, diesel. LOGISTICS: QUARRY-TO-PLANT HAULAGE is the swing cost. FISCAL/ESG: dust/blast-vibration limits, water table, royalties, reserve life vs plant. STRUCTURAL: captive to cement plant economics.

driver_extraction: Cr2O3 grade & Cr:Fe ratio; open-cast vs deepening UG.
driver_processing: spiral/gravity/DMS beneficiation; lumpy vs friable fines.
driver_energy_reagents: beneficiation + captive power for downstream ferrochrome.
driver_fiscal_esg: Cr(VI) contamination controls, water; export duty/policy.
driver_structural: stainless-steel demand; integration with ferrochrome.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: Cr2O3 grade & Cr:Fe ratio; open-cast vs deepening UG. PROCESSING: spiral/gravity/DMS beneficiation; lumpy vs friable fines. ENERGY/REAGENTS: beneficiation + captive power for downstream ferrochrome. LOGISTICS: haul to smelter. FISCAL/ESG: Cr(VI) contamination controls, water; export duty/policy. STRUCTURAL: stainless-steel demand; integration with ferrochrome.

driver_extraction: P2O5 grade & gangue; overburden.
driver_processing: flotation/washing for low grade; cadmium/uranium penalties.
driver_structural: fertilizer/food-security mineral; India import-dependent.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: P2O5 grade & gangue; overburden. PROCESSING: flotation/washing for low grade; cadmium/uranium penalties. ENERGY/REAGENTS: beneficiation water/power. LOGISTICS: bulk shipping. FISCAL/ESG: phosphogypsum waste, cadmium limits. STRUCTURAL: fertilizer/food-security mineral; India import-dependent.

driver_extraction: rock hardness & crushing stages; for sand, SiO2 purity & iron content.
driver_processing: crushing/screening; washing (silica).
driver_logistics: HAULAGE DOMINATES — economics collapse beyond ~50-100 km.
driver_structural: tied to local construction demand & urban proximity.
drivers_raw: EXTRACTION: rock hardness & crushing stages; for sand, SiO2 purity & iron content. PROCESSING: crushing/screening; washing (silica). ENERGY/REAGENTS: crusher power. LOGISTICS: HAULAGE DOMINATES — economics collapse beyond ~50-100 km. FISCAL/ESG: permitting, dust, river-sand/dredging bans (India), royalties.
